cache_policy.reason: sealed schedule has zero planned refetches and pinned cache path is inert

passes: selected acquisition-burst profile without Metal-heavy work
selected steady-pipeline profile with the frozen Metal probe

required_sample_fields.cpu_percent: finite nonnegative percent; aggregate cores may exceed 100

range_strategy.selection: indices = [1 + floor(i*280/47) for i in range(48)]

semantics.adaptive_default: configured by default; enable/disable flag is parsed but not consulted by the pinned 1.5.2 production controller
semantics.chunk_cache: configured but inert: pinned 1.5.2 production download constructors do not attach the cache
semantics.direct_stream_file_limit: direct range streams bypass HF_XET_DATA_MAX_CONCURRENT_FILE_DOWNLOADS; the campaign caller must enforce the declared stream cap
semantics.fixed_download_concurrency: HF_XET_FIXED_DOWNLOAD_CONCURRENCY pins min/initial/max; use for 16/32/64 trials
semantics.high_performance: applied after fixed/custom settings and therefore tested as a separate 4/16/124 profile

schedule_reconciliation.freeze_boundary: requires measured GLM52_XET_AUTOTUNE; no freeze is claimed by this plan

selection_policy.acquisition_burst: fastest safe profile; high-performance may compete
selection_policy.steady_pipeline: fastest safe profile with no sustained heavy-lane regression above 5%
